visual_intent: mist-blue calm with generous breathing room
brand_guardrails: preserve top and bottom safe zones
avoid collage layouts or sticker-heavy UI
maintain continuity with the matching March 23 feed carousel
match mood and restraint from the selected references without copying exact frame layout, crop, or focal placement
lock all 3 story frames to the same typography personality and medium weight
do not use fake buttons or random hierarchy jumps between frames
keep text color density, opacity, and typographic presence visually consistent across all 3 frames
composition: one short message block per frame
text-first story sequence with frame 1 headline, frame 2 support, and frame 3 CTA
cloud-white or mist-blue background with soft steel-blue structure and restrained apricot cues
reference_strategy: Use editorial-whitespace for story breathing room and cool-palette for the calm steel-blue atmosphere, while keeping the frame lighter and simpler than the feed.
variation_guardrails: vary exact text placement from the references
avoid copying reference frame structure literally
keep the background treatment softer and more minimal than the feed
do not introduce new focal objects that compete with the message

batch_lock.text_color: dark charcoal, visually consistent across all frames
batch_lock.weight_presence: same medium-weight feel across all frames

slides_ja: まずは基礎から、やさしく。
毎日の土台を考える時の、ひとつの視点です。
続きはフィードへ。基礎からやさしく。

reference_files: brand/references/business-context/strategy/Mitozz Japan Brand Voice And Messaging Guidelines.docx.pdf
notes: March 23 story reinforcement. Keep the Steel Light mood and vertical breathing room consistent while varying exact text placement, crop, and background treatment. Typography must stay locked across all 3 frames.
